scripts.deploy: cd packages/web && bunx vite build && cd ../.. && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:migrations: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply synergy-db --remote
scripts.deploy:secrets: grep -v '^#' .dev.vars | grep -v '^$' > /tmp/.synergy-secrets && bunx wrangler secret bulk /tmp/.synergy-secrets && rm /tmp/.synergy-secrets
